name: picmal
title: Picmal
description: Convert and compress images, audio, and video with Picmal — straight from Raycast.
author: albertogalca

ai.instructions: Picmal converts and compresses images, audio, and video — and builds PDFs — using the locally installed Picmal app's bundled tools. When the user asks to process files, prefer their current Finder selection or explicit absolute paths. Convert is a pure format change at maximum quality by default — only pass a quality (0–100) to convert-files when the user explicitly wants to also compress the converted file. Use compress-files (not convert) when the goal is to reduce size while keeping the format. Use combine-pdfs to merge two or more PDFs into one (page order = the order of the paths). Use split-pdf to break one PDF into a document per page range ('1-3, 5, 8-'); with no ranges it splits every page into its own PDF. Use images-to-pdf to turn one or more images into a multi-page PDF, one image per page. Use combine-videos to join two or more videos into one (order = the order of the paths). Use app-icon to generate app icons from one image — macOS (.icns), Windows (.ico), and an iOS icon set (.appiconset); it writes a new folder of icons next to the source and is not a size reduction, so don't report savings for it. Convert/compress write new files next to each input (compress adds a '_compressed' suffix); combine-pdfs, images-to-pdf, and combine-videos write a single new file next to the first input; split-pdf writes one PDF per range next to the source. Nothing overwrites existing files unless the user explicitly asks to overwrite. After running, report the output paths; report size savings only for convert and compress (not for the PDF, video, or icon tools, which create new documents).

preferences.name: defaultQuality
preferences.title: Default Quality
preferences.description: Quality preselected in the Convert and Compress forms.

preferences.name: stripMetadata
preferences.title: Defaults
preferences.label: Strip metadata by default
preferences.description: Remove EXIF/IPTC/XMP metadata unless changed per run.

preferences.name: overwrite
preferences.label: Overwrite existing files by default
preferences.description: Replace existing output files unless changed per run.

commands.name: convert
commands.title: Convert Files
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Convert selected files to another format.

preferences.name: defaultFormat
preferences.title: Default Format
preferences.description: Format preselected in the Convert form (e.g. webp). Ignored if unsupported.

preferences.name: compressAfterConverting
preferences.title: Compression
preferences.label: Compress after converting by default
preferences.description: Compress the converted output. When off, Convert keeps maximum quality and only changes the format.

commands.name: compress
commands.title: Compress Files
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Compress selected files while keeping their format.

commands.name: combine
commands.title: Combine PDFs
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Merge two or more PDFs into a single PDF.

commands.name: merge-audio
commands.title: Merge Audio
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Join two or more audio files into one.

commands.name: combine-videos
commands.title: Combine Videos
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Join two or more videos into one.

commands.name: split-pdf
commands.title: Split PDF
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Split a PDF into one document per page range.

commands.name: images-to-pdf
commands.title: Images to PDF
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Create a multi-page PDF from images, one image per page.

commands.name: app-icon
commands.title: Generate App Icons
commands.subtitle: Picmal
commands.description: Generate macOS (.icns), Windows (.ico), and iOS app icons from one image.

tools.name: convert-files
tools.title: Convert Files
tools.description: Convert images, audio, or video files to another format using Picmal.

tools.name: compress-files
tools.title: Compress Files
tools.description: Compress images, audio, or video files while keeping their format using Picmal.

tools.name: combine-pdfs
tools.title: Combine PDFs
tools.description: Merge two or more PDFs into a single PDF, in the order given, using Picmal.

tools.name: combine-videos
tools.title: Combine Videos
tools.description: Join two or more videos into a single video, in the order given, using Picmal.

tools.name: split-pdf
tools.title: Split PDF
tools.description: Split a PDF into one document per page range (or one PDF per page) using Picmal.

tools.name: images-to-pdf
tools.title: Images to PDF
tools.description: Create a multi-page PDF from images (one image per page) using Picmal.

tools.name: app-icon
tools.title: Generate App Icons
tools.description: Generate macOS (.icns), Windows (.ico), and iOS app icons from one image using Picmal.
